creator: julien.gabel@thilelli.net
text:
Well, I am not using NanoBlogger anymore.  Besides that, it seems
that this project is now "dead", according to the nb website (see "Not So
Nano Anymore"):
 - http://nanoblogger.sourceforge.net/

Fix: Using the following nanoblogger.patch file, you can apply the proposed
change and reassign the Ports Team as the official maintainer:
 # cd /usr/ports/www/nanoblogger && make deinstall
 # cd /usr/ports && patch < /tmp/nanoblogger.patch
 # cd /usr/ports/www/nanoblogger && make install clean clean-depends
How-To-Repeat: 	n.a.
